title: conospermum leianthum subsp. orientale
intro: Conospermum leianthum subsp. orientale, also known as the Eastern Conospermum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to eastern Australia, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, with its health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Conospermum leianthum subsp. orientale can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
